stemHtml: The limits of the yellow scale of an airspeed indicator are:

options.a: V<sub>LO</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>NE </sub>for the upper limit.
options.b: V<sub>FE</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>NE</sub> for the upper limit.
options.c: V<sub>LE </sub>for the lower limit and V<sub>NE</sub> for the upper limit.
options.d: V<sub>NO</sub> for the lower limit and V<sub>NE</sub> for the upper limit.
